title: As electric bills rise, some states are focusing on the growing profits of utilities
description: The artificial intelligence boom is leading to fights in some states over growing utility profits. Governors, attorneys general and others are protesting rising electricity bills and say cash-strapped residents are stuck in a broken system. Officials in over a half-dozen states are going to new lengths to try to block rate increases proposed by utilities. Some are pressing utilities to completely change their model for financing major system upgrades. The push comes during a midterm election year in which “affordability” is the leading theme in Democrats’ attempts to loosen Republicans’ control of Washington.
content: HARRISBURG, Pa. (AP) — The artificial intelligence boom is leading to fights in some states over growing utility profits, as governors, attorneys general and others protesting rising electricity bills say cash-strapped residents are stuck in a broken... [1374 chars]

title: AI Will Create More Jobs, Not Destroy Them: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang
description: The debate surrounding artificial intelligence often centres on fears of job loss and automation, but Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang argues that these concerns are overstated. , Technology & Science, Times Now
content: Artificial intelligence has become one of the most debated technologies in the world right now. Every few weeks, there’s another conversation around AI replacing jobs, automating industries, or making certain professions irrelevant. But Nvidia CEO Je... [2808 chars]
